subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath hearkened unto the Call and hath said: "Yea, O Lord of all beings!" Blessed is he who hath answered his Lord when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع الندآء و قال بلی یا مالک العباد طوبی لمن اجاب ربه اذ
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment
